channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19452] LFSCK reports repaired_inconsistent_owner after truncate operation
item.description:
The truncate operation consistently leads to LFSCK reporting repaired_inconsistent_owner. This issue occurs in Lustre version 2.15.6 (other versions not tested)

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. sudo chown -R $USER: /mnt/lustre
  2. lfs setstripe -o 0,1 /mnt/lustre
  3. touch /mnt/lustre/file1
  4. truncate -s 1M /mnt/lustre/file1
  5. sudo lctl lfsck_start -A -r -t all -C -c -o -d

Results:
repaired_inconsistent_owner: 2
This issue appears to be consistently reproducible following the steps outlined above. Truncating to other sizes (e.g. truncate -s 1048596) also gives inconsistent owner issue.

Note that truncating files to a smaller size works fine and behaves as expected.
item.summary: LFSCK reports repaired_inconsistent_owner after truncate operation

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: The LU-18757 patch landed for 2.17.

Taking a further look.

I added some print statements under lustre/lfsck/lfsck_layout.c:lfsck_layout_repair_owner():

CDEBUG(D_LFSCK, "[mydebug] inconsistent file owner check: version=%llu, parent="DFID", child "DFID
	", OST-index %u, stripe-index %u, cla_time=%llu, tla_time=%llu, cla_size=%llu, tla_size=%llu\n",
	version, PFID(lfsck_dto2fid(parent)), PFID(lfsck_dto2fid(child)), llr->llr_ost_idx, llr->llr_lov_idx, cla->la_ctime, tla->la_ctime, cla->la_size, tla->la_size);

And tested with

sudo chown -R $USER: /mnt/lustre
lfs setstripe -E 1M -c 1 -S 1M -E 4M -c 2 -S 1M -E -1 -c 2 -S 1M /mnt/lustre 
touch /mnt/lustre/file1
truncate -s 4M /mnt/lustre/file1

 
This initialized all file stripes
stripe info:

$ lfs getstripe /mnt/lustre/file1 /mnt/lustre/file1
  lcm_layout_gen:    4
  lcm_mirror_count:  1
  lcm_entry_count:   3
    lcme_id:             1
    lcme_mirror_id:      0
    lcme_flags:          init
    lcme_extent.e_start: 0
    lcme_extent.e_end:   1048576
      lmm_stripe_count:  1
      lmm_stripe_size:   1048576
      lmm_pattern:       raid0
      lmm_layout_gen:    0
      lmm_stripe_offset: 0
      lmm_objects:
      - 0: { l_ost_idx: 0, l_fid: [0x100000000:0x2:0x0] }
    lcme_id:             2
    lcme_mirror_id:      0
    lcme_flags:          init
    lcme_extent.e_start: 1048576
    lcme_extent.e_end:   4194304
      lmm_stripe_count:  2
      lmm_stripe_size:   1048576
      lmm_pattern:       raid0
      lmm_layout_gen:    0
      lmm_stripe_offset: 1
      lmm_objects:
      - 0: { l_ost_idx: 1, l_fid: [0x100010000:0x2:0x0] }
      - 1: { l_ost_idx: 0, l_fid: [0x100000000:0x3:0x0] }
    lcme_id:             3
    lcme_mirror_id:      0
    lcme_flags:          init
    lcme_extent.e_start: 4194304
    lcme_extent.e_end:   EOF
      lmm_stripe_count:  2
      lmm_stripe_size:   1048576
      lmm_pattern:       raid0
      lmm_layout_gen:    0
      lmm_stripe_offset: 1
      lmm_objects:
      - 0: { l_ost_idx: 1, l_fid: [0x100010000:0x3:0x0] }
      - 1: { l_ost_idx: 0, l_fid: [0x100000000:0x4:0x0] }

The last componet's stripes

  1. have non-zero data version: e.g. version=4294967299
  2. have uid/gid = 0/0
  3. have la_size=2M
    Not sure if la_size and data version above are expected values. But uid/gid are incorrect.
$ cat dk_out | grep owner | grep debug
00100000:10000000:7.0:1759850876.218320:0:724843:0:(lfsck_layout.c:4089:lfsck_layout_repair_owner()) [mydebug] inconsistent file owner check: version=0, parent=[0x200000401:0x1:0x0], child [0x100000000:0x2:0x0], OST-index 0, stripe-index 0, cla_time=1759850872, tla_time=0, cla_size=0, tla_size=0

00100000:10000000:7.0:1759850876.218424:0:724843:0:(lfsck_layout.c:4089:lfsck_layout_repair_owner()) [mydebug] inconsistent file owner check: version=0, parent=[0x200000401:0x1:0x0], child [0x100010000:0x2:0x0], OST-index 1, stripe-index 0, cla_time=0, tla_time=0, cla_size=0, tla_size=0

00100000:10000000:7.0:1759850876.218509:0:724843:0:(lfsck_layout.c:4089:lfsck_layout_repair_owner()) [mydebug] inconsistent file owner check: version=0, parent=[0x200000401:0x1:0x0], child [0x100000000:0x3:0x0], OST-index 0, stripe-index 1, cla_time=0, tla_time=0, cla_size=0, tla_size=0

00100000:10000000:7.0:1759850876.218639:0:724843:0:(lfsck_layout.c:4089:lfsck_layout_repair_owner()) [mydebug] inconsistent file owner check: version=4294967299, parent=[0x200000401:0x1:0x0], child [0x100010000:0x3:0x0], OST-index 1, stripe-index 0, cla_time=1759850872, tla_time=0, cla_size=2097152, tla_size=0

00100000:10000000:7.0:1759850876.218779:0:724843:0:(lfsck_layout.c:4089:lfsck_layout_repair_owner()) [mydebug] inconsistent file owner check: version=4294967300, parent=[0x200000401:0x1:0x0], child [0x100000000:0x4:0x0], OST-index 0, stripe-index 1, cla_time=1759850872, tla_time=0, cla_size=2097152, tla_size=0
